field.label: Enable Antivirus
field.help: Enable ICAP response scanning through Squid, c-icap and ClamAV.

field.label: Proxy Mode
field.help: Select the Squid traffic entry mode used by the deployment.

field.label: Scan HTTPS Downloads
field.help: HTTPS scanning requires Squid SSL inspection to be configured separately.

field.label: Fail Open
field.help: Allow web traffic when the ICAP scanner is unavailable.
